basis.description: Valid authority may ground or issue duties within its defined governance scope.

when: authority acts within the recognized scope of standing
unless: the standing is invalidated or exceeds scope

effect.description: A scoped duty may be generated or grounded from authority.

status.note: Schema-only example for the relation layer foundation.

target.label: Responsibility activated by duty breach or non-performance

basis.description: Duty breach, non-performance, or attributable outcome may activate responsibility.

when: duty performance fails, breaches, or produces attributable outcome
unless: the duty is discharged or the trigger event does not occur

effect.description: Responsibility becomes active when the duty trigger condition is met.

status.note: Schema-only example for future cross-concept law validation.

basis.description: Legitimacy evaluates whether authority standing counts as justified or accepted.

when: authority standing is assessed within governance order
unless: no evaluative basis is available for legitimacy review

effect.description: Legitimacy may validate, weaken, or invalidate authority standing.

status.note: Schema-only example for authority validation relation.
